argument: The core of the contested claim, which is that Sebastian Bosma is a founding member of Skillset, can be substantiated; evidence from the source [launchtracker] explicitly identifies him as a "Co-Founder & CEO". While the prosecution argues against a formal CEO role and highlights the absence of additional verification, this does not negate his self-stated title in a publicly accessible source. Regarding the independent verification of the CEO role, it's conceded that more formal documentation has not been presented in the record. However, it's important to note that other reputable sources, such as [deck] which also refers to him as Co-Founder & CEO, lend credibility to this claim. Without further evidence disproving his title, the claim stands supported by the available documentation.
